description.value:
Your ancestors served the Veskarium for countless generations. You've incorporated vesk traditions into your own life, and the Veskarium has freely shared its secrets with you.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Adopted Ancestry] general feat and must choose vesk. You gain a 1st-level @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestries.Item.Vesk] ancestry feat for which you qualify, and your mantle grows tougher. Increase your resistance to precision damage by 2.
